proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_tamoxifen have a different mean pfs_months than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_palbociclib have a different mean pfs_months than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_trastuzumab have a different mean pfs_months than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have a different mean pfs_months than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan have a different mean pfs_months than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have a different mean pfs_months than those not receiving it.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months 4.72 on treatment_tamoxifen (n=15035) vs 4.68 off (n=34965); diff=0.043, t=1.77, p=0.0769.
Mean pfs_months 5.41 on treatment_palbociclib (n=17428) vs 4.31 off (n=32572); diff=1.098, t=43.54, p=0.
Mean pfs_months 4.64 on treatment_trastuzumab (n=10039) vs 4.71 off (n=39961); diff=-0.060, t=-2.18, p=0.0292.
Mean pfs_months 4.66 on treatment_olaparib (n=4946) vs 4.70 off (n=45054); diff=-0.036, t=-0.97, p=0.33.
Mean pfs_months 4.69 on treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan (n=4987) vs 4.69 off (n=45013); diff=-0.007, t=-0.19, p=0.846.
Mean pfs_months 4.63 on treatment_pembrolizumab (n=7585) vs 4.70 off (n=42415); diff=-0.074, t=-2.38, p=0.0175.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months differs between patients with er_positive=1 and patients with er_positive=0.
Mean pfs_months differs between patients with pr_positive=1 and patients with pr_positive=0.
Mean pfs_months differs between patients with her2_positive=1 and patients with her2_positive=0.
Mean pfs_months differs between patients with her2_low=1 and patients with her2_low=0.
Mean pfs_months differs between patients with brca1_mutation=1 and patients with brca1_mutation=0.
Mean pfs_months differs between patients with brca2_mutation=1 and patients with brca2_mutation=0.
Mean pfs_months differs between patients with pik3ca_mutation=1 and patients with pik3ca_mutation=0.
Mean pfs_months differs between patients with msi_high=1 and patients with msi_high=0.
Mean pfs_months differs between patients with tp53_mutation=1 and patients with tp53_mutation=0.
Mean pfs_months differs between patients with pten_loss=1 and patients with pten_loss=0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months 4.86 (er_positive=1, n=34886) vs 4.30 (er_positive=0, n=15114); diff=0.568, p=3.7e-143.
Mean pfs_months 4.82 (pr_positive=1, n=31954) vs 4.46 (pr_positive=0, n=18046); diff=0.362, p=5.82e-59.
Mean pfs_months 4.32 (her2_positive=1, n=9060) vs 4.78 (her2_positive=0, n=40940); diff=-0.459, p=6.1e-70.
Mean pfs_months 4.76 (her2_low=1, n=18543) vs 4.65 (her2_low=0, n=31457); diff=0.114, p=1.04e-06.
Mean pfs_months 4.67 (brca1_mutation=1, n=1277) vs 4.69 (brca1_mutation=0, n=48723); diff=-0.024, p=0.724.
Mean pfs_months 4.57 (brca2_mutation=1, n=1222) vs 4.70 (brca2_mutation=0, n=48778); diff=-0.127, p=0.0813.
Mean pfs_months 4.33 (pik3ca_mutation=1, n=17365) vs 4.89 (pik3ca_mutation=0, n=32635); diff=-0.559, p=6.07e-144.
Mean pfs_months 4.72 (msi_high=1, n=498) vs 4.69 (msi_high=0, n=49502); diff=0.032, p=0.769.
Mean pfs_months 4.70 (tp53_mutation=1, n=22479) vs 4.69 (tp53_mutation=0, n=27521); diff=0.007, p=0.762.
Mean pfs_months 4.66 (pten_loss=1, n=2535) vs 4.69 (pten_loss=0, n=47465); diff=-0.039, p=0.439.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with stage_iv=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with stage_iv=0.
Patients with has_brain_mets=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with has_brain_mets=0.
Patients with liver_mets=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with liver_mets=0.
Patients with bone_mets=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with bone_mets=0.
Patients with node_positive=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with node_positive=0.
Higher ecog_ps is associated with lower mean pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher tumor_size_cm is associated with lower mean pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher ki67_pct is associated with lower mean pfs_months (negative slope).

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months 3.62 (stage_iv=1) vs 5.15 (stage_iv=0); diff=-1.536, p=0.
Mean pfs_months 3.75 (has_brain_mets=1) vs 4.80 (has_brain_mets=0); diff=-1.050, p=1.45e-178.
Mean pfs_months 4.71 (liver_mets=1) vs 4.69 (liver_mets=0); diff=0.018, p=0.555.
Mean pfs_months 4.72 (bone_mets=1) vs 4.69 (bone_mets=0); diff=0.038, p=0.17.
Mean pfs_months 4.68 (node_positive=1) vs 4.70 (node_positive=0); diff=-0.024, p=0.292.
OLS slope of pfs_months on ecog_ps: -1.1800 months per unit (p=0).
OLS slope of pfs_months on tumor_size_cm: 0.0006 months per unit (p=0.931).
OLS slope of pfs_months on ki67_pct: -0.0188 months per unit (p=2.98e-93).

proposed_hypotheses.text: pfs_months has a positive linear association with albumin_g_dl.
pfs_months has a negative linear association with ldh_u_l.
pfs_months has a negative linear association with crp_mg_l.
pfs_months has a negative linear association with nlr.
pfs_months has a negative linear association with weight_loss_pct_6mo.
pfs_months has a positive linear association with hemoglobin_g_dl.
pfs_months has a negative linear association with alkaline_phosphatase_u_l.

analyses.result_summary: OLS slope of pfs_months on albumin_g_dl: 0.49877 months per unit (p=9.39e-112).
OLS slope of pfs_months on ldh_u_l: -0.00051 months per unit (p=0.000245).
OLS slope of pfs_months on crp_mg_l: -0.00088 months per unit (p=0.461).
OLS slope of pfs_months on nlr: 0.00331 months per unit (p=0.537).
OLS slope of pfs_months on weight_loss_pct_6mo: -0.07473 months per unit (p=4.07e-148).
OLS slope of pfs_months on hemoglobin_g_dl: -0.00639 months per unit (p=0.304).
OLS slope of pfs_months on alkaline_phosphatase_u_l: -0.00067 months per unit (p=0.00295).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Tamoxifen extends pfs_months more in er_positive=1 patients than in er_positive=0 patients (positive treatment×ER interaction).
Among er_positive=1 patients, mean pfs_months is higher on treatment_tamoxifen than off.
Among er_positive=0 patients, treatment_tamoxifen is not associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coefficient treatment_tamoxifen:er_positive = -0.058 (p=0.27).
In ER+ patients, pfs_months 4.88 on tamoxifen vs 4.86 off; diff=0.023, p=0.45.
In ER- patients, pfs_months 4.35 on tamoxifen vs 4.27 off; diff=0.081, p=0.03.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Trastuzumab extends pfs_months more in her2_positive=1 patients than in her2_positive=0 patients (positive treatment×HER2 interaction).
Among her2_positive=1 patients, mean pfs_months is higher on treatment_trastuzumab than off.
Among her2_positive=0 patients, treatment_trastuzumab is not associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coefficient treatment_trastuzumab:her2_positive = -0.028 (p=0.695).
In HER2+ patients, pfs_months 4.25 on trastuzumab vs 4.33 off; diff=-0.079, p=0.153.
In HER2- patients, pfs_months 4.74 on trastuzumab vs 4.79 off; diff=-0.051, p=0.104.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Olaparib extends pfs_months more in patients with brca1_mutation=1 or brca2_mutation=1 (combined brca_any) than in patients without (positive treatment×BRCA interaction).
Among brca_any=1 patients, mean pfs_months is higher on treatment_olaparib than off.
Among brca_any=0 patients, treatment_olaparib is not associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coefficient treatment_olaparib:brca_any = 0.402 (p=0.0208).
In BRCA-mutated patients, pfs_months 4.93 on olaparib (n=239) vs 4.59 off (n=2260); diff=0.346, p=0.0414.
In BRCA-WT patients, pfs_months 4.65 on olaparib vs 4.70 off; diff=-0.056, p=0.143.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Palbociclib extends pfs_months more in er_positive=1 patients than in er_positive=0 (positive treatment_palbociclib × er_positive interaction).
Among er_positive=1 patients, mean pfs_months is higher on treatment_palbociclib than off.
Among er_positive=1 patients, mean pfs_months is higher when both treatment_palbociclib=1 AND treatment_tamoxifen=1 than in patients receiving neither.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coefficient treatment_palbociclib:er_positive = 1.594 (p=9.31e-229).
In ER+ patients, pfs_months 5.89 on palbociclib vs 4.31 off; diff=1.577, p=0.
In ER+ patients, pfs_months 5.90 with both palbo+tam (n=3675) vs 4.30 with neither (n=15832); diff=1.596, p=1.25e-175.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Sacituzumab govitecan extends pfs_months more in her2_low=1 patients than in her2_low=0 patients (positive interaction).
Sacituzumab govitecan extends pfs_months more in TNBC (er_positive=0 AND pr_positive=0 AND her2_positive=0) patients than in non-TNBC patients (positive interaction).
Among TNBC patients, mean pfs_months is higher on treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan than off.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coefficient sacituzumab:her2_low = -0.038 (p=0.626).
Interaction coefficient sacituzumab:tnbc = -0.105 (p=0.246).
In TNBC patients, pfs_months 4.23 on sacituzumab (n=1084) vs 4.31 off (n=9412); diff=-0.085, p=0.217.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Pembrolizumab extends pfs_months more in msi_high=1 patients than in msi_high=0 (positive interaction).
Pembrolizumab extends pfs_months more in TNBC patients than in non-TNBC patients (positive interaction).
Among TNBC patients, mean pfs_months is higher on treatment_pembrolizumab than off.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction pembrolizumab:msi_high = 0.217 (p=0.466).
Interaction pembrolizumab:tnbc = 0.185 (p=0.0152).
In TNBC patients, pfs_months 4.37 on pembrolizumab (n=1578) vs 4.29 off (n=8918); diff=0.072, p=0.222.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, liver_mets, ldh_u_l, albumin_g_dl, and disease subtype indicators (er_positive, her2_positive), treatment_palbociclib remains positively associated with pfs_months.
Adjusted treatment_trastuzumab effect on pfs_months remains positive in the same multivariable model.
Adjusted treatment_pembrolizumab effect on pfs_months is not positive (i.e., zero or negative) in the same multivariable model.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_tamoxifen + treatment_palbociclib + treatment_trastuzumab + treatment_olaparib + treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan + treatment_pembrolizumab + age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + liver_mets + bone_mets + ldh_u_l + albumin_g_dl + crp_mg_l + nlr + er_positive + her2_positive', data=df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted treatment_palbociclib coefficient = 1.098 months (p=0).
Adjusted treatment_trastuzumab coefficient = -0.010 months (p=0.454).
Adjusted treatment_pembrolizumab coefficient = -0.029 months (p=0.0554).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months differs across race_ethnicity categories.
Patients with insurance_type='uninsured' have lower mean pfs_months than patients with insurance_type='private'.
rural_residence=1 is associated with lower mean pfs_months than rural_residence=0.
education_years has a positive linear association with pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: ANOVA F=0.85, p=0.494; white mean = 4.68, black mean = 4.72.
Uninsured mean pfs_months 4.73 vs private 4.68; diff=0.048, p=0.411.
Rural mean pfs_months 4.71 vs non-rural 4.69; diff=0.027, p=0.343.
OLS slope of pfs_months on education_years: -0.0032 months/year (p=0.388).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher age_years is linearly associated with lower pfs_months (negative slope).
postmenopausal=1 patients have different mean pfs_months than postmenopausal=0 patients.
Among ER+ patients, the tamoxifen benefit (treatment_tamoxifen on pfs_months) is larger in postmenopausal=1 than in postmenopausal=0 (treatment×postmenopausal interaction within ER+).

analyses.result_summary: OLS slope of pfs_months on age_years: 0.17592 months/year (p=0).
Postmenopausal mean pfs_months 4.68 vs premenopausal 4.71; diff=-0.023, p=0.311.
In ER+ subset, interaction treatment_tamoxifen:postmenopausal = -0.034 (p=0.587).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with diabetes_mellitus=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with diabetes_mellitus=0.
Patients with hypertension=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with hypertension=0.
Patients with copd=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with copd=0.
Patients with chronic_kidney_disease=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with chronic_kidney_disease=0.
Patients with heart_failure=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with heart_failure=0.
Patients with coronary_artery_disease=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with coronary_artery_disease=0.
Patients with autoimmune_disease=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with autoimmune_disease=0.
Patients with prior_malignancy=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with prior_malignancy=0.
Patients with depression_anxiety_diagnosis=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with depression_anxiety_diagnosis=0.
Patients with interstitial_lung_disease_history=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with interstitial_lung_disease_history=0.

analyses.result_summary: diabetes_mellitus=1 mean 4.71 (n=11073) vs =0 mean 4.69; diff=0.022, p=0.413.
hypertension=1 mean 4.69 (n=27510) vs =0 mean 4.69; diff=-0.002, p=0.913.
chronic_kidney_disease=1 mean 4.71 (n=6060) vs =0 mean 4.69; diff=0.016, p=0.642.
heart_failure=1 mean 4.71 (n=5038) vs =0 mean 4.69; diff=0.016, p=0.671.

autoimmune_disease=1 mean 4.65 (n=2397) vs =0 mean 4.70; diff=-0.045, p=0.377.
prior_malignancy=1 mean 4.65 (n=6032) vs =0 mean 4.70; diff=-0.047, p=0.166.
depression_anxiety_diagnosis=1 mean 4.67 (n=9153) vs =0 mean 4.70; diff=-0.030, p=0.302.
interstitial_lung_disease_history=1 mean 4.68 (n=1961) vs =0 mean 4.69; diff=-0.013, p=0.819.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher fatigue_grade is associated with lower pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher pain_nrs is associated with lower pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher dyspnea_grade is associated with lower pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher cough_grade is associated with lower pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher appetite_loss_grade is associated with lower pfs_months (negative slope).

analyses.result_summary: OLS slope of pfs_months on fatigue_grade: 0.0005 months/grade (p=0.963).
OLS slope of pfs_months on pain_nrs: -0.0015 months/grade (p=0.72).
OLS slope of pfs_months on dyspnea_grade: 0.0104 months/grade (p=0.299).
OLS slope of pfs_months on cough_grade: -0.0089 months/grade (p=0.384).
OLS slope of pfs_months on appetite_loss_grade: -0.0018 months/grade (p=0.861).

proposed_hypotheses.text: At least one snp_* genotype variable has a significant linear association with pfs_months at p<0.05 (omnibus screen).
After Bonferroni correction across all snp_* variables, none retain significance.

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months ~ snp for each snp_* col
analyses.result_summary: 1/24 snp_* variables had unadjusted p<0.05; smallest p was snp_rs1801131 slope=-0.054, p=0.0264.
After Bonferroni at alpha=0.05/24=0.0021, 0/24 snp_* survived.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among ER+ patients, the joint use of treatment_palbociclib and treatment_tamoxifen produces a positive interaction effect on pfs_months beyond their individual effects.
Among HER2+ patients, joint treatment_trastuzumab and treatment_pembrolizumab produces a positive interaction on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: In ER+ subset, palbociclib×tamoxifen interaction = -0.018 (p=0.776).
In HER2+ subset, trastuzumab×pembrolizumab interaction = -0.205 (p=0.187).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Patients with prior_immunotherapy=1 have shorter pfs_months than prior_immunotherapy=0.
years_since_diagnosis is positively associated with pfs_months (long-survivors selection).

analyses.result_summary: Slope = 0.0093 months/line (p=0.343).
prior_immunotherapy=1 mean 4.69 (n=7501) vs =0 mean 4.69; diff=-0.001, p=0.98.
Slope = -0.0032 months/year (p=0.63).

proposed_hypotheses.text: weight_loss_pct_6mo modifies the treatment_palbociclib effect on pfs_months in ER+ patients (negative interaction term).
albumin_g_dl modifies the treatment_trastuzumab effect on pfs_months in HER2+ patients (positive interaction term).

analyses.result_summary: In ER+, palbociclib×weight_loss_pct_6mo interaction = 0.0152 (p=0.0372).
In HER2+, trastuzumab×albumin interaction = 0.1619 (p=0.143).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among ER+ patients, pik3ca_mutation=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than pik3ca_mutation=0.
Among ER+ patients, the palbociclib pfs_months benefit differs by pik3ca_mutation status (treatment×pik3ca interaction).

analyses.result_summary: In ER+, pik3ca=1 mean 4.34 vs =0 mean 5.14; diff=-0.800, p=1.92e-192.
In ER+, palbociclib×pik3ca interaction = -2.340 (p=0).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with has_brain_mets=1 have shorter pfs_months than patients with has_brain_mets=0 (replicate, signed).
In has_brain_mets=1 HER2+ patients, treatment_trastuzumab is still associated with longer pfs_months than no trastuzumab.
The has_brain_mets effect is more negative in stage_iv=1 patients than in stage_iv=0 patients (interaction).

analyses.result_summary: brain_mets=1 mean 3.75 vs =0 mean 4.80; diff=-1.050, p=1.45e-178.
In HER2+/brain_mets, trastuzumab on mean 3.24 (n=206) vs off mean 3.48 (n=721); diff=-0.238, p=0.148.
Interaction has_brain_mets:stage_iv = -0.035 (p=0.648).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among her2_positive=0 patients, treatment_trastuzumab provides no positive pfs_months benefit (effect ≤ 0).
Among brca_any=0 patients, treatment_olaparib provides no positive pfs_months benefit.
Among er_positive=0 patients, treatment_tamoxifen provides no positive pfs_months benefit.

analyses.result_summary: In HER2- patients, trastuzumab on mean 4.74 vs off mean 4.79; diff=-0.051, p=0.104.
In BRCA-WT, olaparib on mean 4.65 vs off mean 4.70; diff=-0.056, p=0.143.
In ER- patients, tamoxifen on mean 4.35 vs off mean 4.27; diff=0.081, p=0.03.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a model with treatment×biomarker interactions, treatment_trastuzumab:her2_positive remains positive after adjusting for age, ECOG, stage_iv, and lab markers.
In the same model, treatment_olaparib:brca_any remains positive.
In the same model, treatment_palbociclib:er_positive remains positive.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted trastuzumab×her2_positive = 0.030 (p=0.382).
Adjusted olaparib×brca_any = 0.036 (p=0.665).
Adjusted palbociclib×er_positive = 1.580 (p=0).

proposed_hypotheses.text: sex_female=1 is associated with different mean pfs_months than sex_female=0 in this breast cancer cohort.
psa_ng_ml has no meaningful linear association with pfs_months (irrelevant marker for breast cancer).
ros1_fusion=1 is not associated with different pfs_months (irrelevant breast biomarker).

analyses.result_summary: Slope on psa_ng_ml = 0.00631 (p=0.0602).
ros1_fusion=1 mean 4.71 vs =0 mean 4.69; diff=0.014, p=0.903.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A composite poor-prognosis indicator (ecog_ps>=2 OR has_brain_mets=1 OR liver_mets=1 OR albumin_g_dl<3.5) is associated with shorter pfs_months than its absence.
After adjusting for the composite poor-prognosis indicator, age, and disease stage, the matched-therapy interaction effects (trastuzumab×HER2, olaparib×BRCA, palbociclib×ER) remain positive.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted poor_prog effect = -0.890 (p=0); trastuzumab×HER2=0.017 (p=0.667); olaparib×BRCA=0.098 (p=0.32); palbociclib×ER=1.579 (p=0).
